reviews.comment:
Te hacen esperar mucho y encima ponen la pistola a un auto y se van con toda la pachorra a cargar otro vehículo y uno tiene que esperar que les den ganas de atenderte.

(Translated by Google)
They make you wait a long time, then they put the gun on one car and leisurely go to load another vehicle, and you have to wait until they feel like helping you.
